# Post History (auto-generated by the loop)

This directory is maintained automatically by the social content remix loop.
It tracks everything that's been posted — what, when, where, and which source
content it was remixed from.

The loop writes here on every tick. It also reads back to avoid reposting
content from the same source video twice.

## File structure

```
history/
├── 2026-06.md    ← June 2026 post log
├── 2026-07.md    ← July 2026 post log
└── processed.yaml ← source videos already processed (prevents duplicates)
```

## Post log format

Each entry in the monthly file:

```markdown
## 2026-06-28 14:30 UTC

### X — Thread
**Source:** Alex Hormozi — "Why 99% of Businesses Fail" (https://youtube.com/watch?v=...)
**Posts:** 4
**Scheduled for:** 2026-06-28 15:00 UTC

Post 1: Most businesses don't fail because of competition...

Post 2, 3, 4: ...

### LinkedIn — Post
**Source:** Same video
**Scheduled for:** 2026-06-28 17:00 UTC

...
```
